introSection: Drakon is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
Valgard - Realm of the Vikings was announced in May 2025, along with a new roller coaster named Drakon. Around this time, concrete footers began to be poured.

Track pieces started arriving by August 2025.

On 29 October 2025, the opening date of the ride alongside its surrounding area of Valgard - Realm of the Vikings was announced for 16 May 2026.

On 6 November 2025, the final piece of track was installed.

Drakon's three trains arrived on 27 February 2026.

Drakon's train design was revelled on 28 February 2026.

fullText:
Drakon is a steel roller coaster currently under construction at Paultons Park in Romsey, Hampshire, England, UK.

Valgard - Realm of the Vikings was announced in May 2025, along with a new roller coaster named Drakon. Around this time, concrete footers began to be poured.

Track pieces started arriving by August 2025.

On 29 October 2025, the opening date of the ride alongside its surrounding area of Valgard - Realm of the Vikings was announced for 16 May 2026.

On 6 November 2025, the final piece of track was installed.

Drakon's three trains arrived on 27 February 2026.

Drakon's train design was revelled on 28 February 2026.
